message:
fix(runtime): sort channels/patterns in unsubscribe-all for deterministic order

When UNSUBSCRIBE/PUNSUBSCRIBE/SUNSUBSCRIBE are called without arguments
(unsubscribe from all), the iteration over HashSet<Vec<u8>> produced
non-deterministic ordering. Sort the collected channels/patterns before
iterating to match Redis's deterministic reply ordering.

Fixes core_pubsub_conformance test failure (sunsubscribe_all_shard_channels).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
